zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏多
zh.content:
当前BTC/USD价格稳定在77019.99附近，较20日均线76827.08略高，显示价格短期存在轻微上行趋势。价格在77039.01高点和76810.3低点之间波动，表明市场仍处于震荡整理阶段，多空双方势均力敌。

MACD指标显示-283.02，虽然信号线未提供，但负值暗示短线动能偏弱，仍需关注潜在回调风险。缺乏RSI数据限制了超买超卖判断，但结合均线和价格走势，可认为短期仍有支撑在76800附近。

关键支撑位在76810-76830区间，若跌破可能加速下行；阻力位则在77040-77100附近，突破后或迎来进一步拉升。交易者可关注支撑反弹和阻力承压的价格行为，设置止损以降低风险。

操作上建议短线可尝试低吸高抛策略，逢支撑区域布局多单，阻力区考虑逐步减仓或观望；中长线持币者应保持谨慎，等待趋势明朗再做加仓决策，以避免震荡期间频繁操作带来的波动损失。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin is currently showing signs of a moderate bullish bias around the $77,020 mark, having maintained a narrow intraday range between $76,810 and $77,039. Price action suggests that the market is consolidating just above the 20-period simple moving average (SMA), which sits at $76,827. This indicates that short-term momentum remains slightly positive. Traders should note the price’s ability to hold above this SMA, as a sustained break below could trigger deeper pullbacks toward the $76,500 support zone.  

Although the relative strength index (RSI) is unavailable, the MACD’s negative value of -283.02 suggests some bearish undertone in the broader trend, even though the market is not showing sharp directional pressure. The absence of a signal line makes crossovers unusable for now, so momentum should be interpreted cautiously. Overall, this combination of consolidation above SMA and negative MACD signals a market in mild tension, with neither buyers nor sellers fully dominant.  

Key levels to watch include support near $76,800–$76,500 and immediate resistance around $77,200–$77,400. These zones will likely dictate short-term trading ranges. A decisive break above resistance could open a path toward $78,000, while a failure to hold support may invite a test of $76,000. Volume patterns and candlestick formations at these levels will provide critical clues for directional continuation.  

Trading strategies should remain measured, favoring small, tactical positions. Long entries near support with tight stops could exploit potential rebounds, while short-term breakout trades above $77,200 may capture bullish momentum. Given the mixed signals from SMA positioning and MACD, risk management is crucial. Traders should avoid over-leveraging, monitor news catalysts, and prepare for rapid swings as market participants reassess short-term BTC/USD sentiment.
